mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_sessions (session_uuid, user_id, device_id, device_name, client_type, refresh_token_hash, expires_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{sessionUuid}, #{userId}, #{deviceId}, #{deviceName}, #{clientType}, #{refreshTokenHash}, #{expiresAt}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.session_uuid, s.user_id, u.user_uuid, s.device_id, s.device_name, s.client_type, s.refresh_token_hash, s.expires_at, s.revoked_at, s.created_at FROM user_sessions s JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.id WHERE s.session_uuid = #{sessionUuid} AND s.revoked_at IS NULL LIMIT 1

SELECT s.id, s.session_uuid, s.user_id, u.user_uuid, s.device_id, s.device_name, s.client_type, s.refresh_token_hash, s.expires_at, s.revoked_at, s.created_at FROM user_sessions s JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.id WHERE s.refresh_token_hash = #{refreshTokenHash} AND s.revoked_at IS NULL LIMIT 1

SELECT s.id, s.session_uuid, s.user_id, u.user_uuid, s.device_id, s.device_name, s.client_type, s.refresh_token_hash, s.expires_at, s.revoked_at, s.created_at FROM user_sessions s JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.id WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.revoked_at IS NULL ORDER BY s.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE user_sessions SET revoked_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE session_uuid = #{sessionUuid} AND revoked_at IS NULL
